Sun are rather weak.
Chart No. 35 is the horoscope of a fortunate but self-
made man. Though Lagna is hemmed in between Ketu and
Saturn indicating an unsteady career, it is free from any
other malefic influences. Jupiter is in Lagna. Saturn, lord of
Lagna, is in his own sign. In the Navamsa also

78 How to Judge a Horoscope
Chart No. 34.—Born on 28/29-3-1890 at 4-30 a.m. (L.T.)
Lat. 13° N., Long. 5h. 10m. 20s.
Balance of Jupiter Dasa at birth : Years 12-11-6.
Chart No. 35—Born on 27/28-5-1903 at 1-19 a.m. (L.T.)
Lat 9° N., Long. 5h. 10m. 48s. E.
Balance of Mars Dasa at birth : Years 5-10-7.

Concerning the First House 79
Saturn is in a friendly sign with the benefic Jupiter. The
Sun of course is middling in strength. Jupiter's presence in
the ascendant is a strong factor acting as an antidote for
other malefic influences. The native has a forceful,
imposing and attractive personality, countenance,
handsome, appearance, good and disposition elegant.
